title: Map Builder

layers.title: Layers
layers.emptyState: Add datasets from the catalog to get started

empty.title: Start with data
empty.description: Add a dataset first, then tune terrain, basemap, labels, and interactions around it.

surface.title: Surface
surface.description: Scene foundation, terrain, and elevation sources.

relief.title: Relief
relief.description: DEM-derived visual overlays such as hillshade and color relief.

basemap.title: Basemap
basemap.description: Base map preset and future sublayer appearance controls.

labels.title: Labels
labels.description: Basemap and data label layers drawn above data geometry.

interactions.title: Interactions
interactions.description: Popup and plugin affordances surfaced with the map.

subtitles.surfaceBackground: Draws below terrain, basemap, relief, and data.
subtitles.basemapLabelsVisible: Draw above data geometry and below data labels.

preview.title: Pending style preview
preview.revertTitle: Discard unsaved style changes and restore the saved style

style.unsupportedBuilderState: This imported style uses settings the visual editor cannot safely change. Valid settings are preserved; use Advanced JSON for the unsupported parts.

sections.renderDescription: Choose how this point layer should draw.
sections.dataDrivenDescription: Color or size features by an attribute.
sections.appearanceDescription: Tune the selected layer's visible geometry and zoom range.
sections.heatmapDescription: Tune density, radius, intensity, and ramp.
sections.symbolDescription: Choose icons, size, rotation, and value-specific symbols.
sections.clusterDescription: Tune cluster radius, expansion zoom, and count labels.
sections.advancedDescription: Edit MapLibre paint and layout directly when needed.

zoomExpression.unsupported: This property uses an unsupported expression. Use Advanced JSON to edit it.

style.heightColumnRemoved: Height column “{{column}}” was removed during re-upload. Select a new column or clear this setting.

raster.title: Raster
raster.help: Adjust imagery appearance for this layer only.
raster.brightnessRangeError: Brightness min must be less than or equal to brightness max.
raster.stretchColormapHint: Stretch sets the input range for the colormap.

hillshade.help: Tune the relief overlay generated from this DEM layer.

lineGradient.label: Line color
lineGradient.customExpression: Custom expression — switch to Advanced editor
lineGradient.advancedHint: Paste a MapLibre line-gradient expression. Recognized canonical expressions will re-populate the stops panel.
lineGradient.structureError: Expression must be an array starting with a known operator

style.validatorUnavailable: This JSON could not be validated — simplify the value and try again.

filters.title: Filters
filters.scopeHelp: Applies only to {{layer}}. Duplicate layers from the same dataset keep separate filters and public output follows the saved layer filter.
filters.noColumns: This layer has no filterable columns.
filters.opaqueWarning: This filter uses advanced expressions. Use JSON mode to edit.

labels.title: Labels
labels.scopeHelp: Label settings apply only to this layer.
labels.noColumns: This layer has no columns available for labels.

popup.scopeHelp: Popup settings apply only when features from this layer are clicked.
popup.noFieldsSelected: No fields selected (only the title will show)
popup.noColumns: This layer has no inspectable columns.
popup.mediaHint: URLs and images in field values render as links and previews automatically.

dataDriven.title: Data-Driven Style
dataDriven.scopeHelp: Creates MapLibre paint expressions while keeping the builder style config aligned.
dataDriven.noTextColumnsHelp: Categorical styles need a text column. Switch to graduated mode or add a text attribute.
dataDriven.noNumericColumnsHelp: Graduated styles need a numeric column. Switch to categorical mode or add a numeric attribute.
dataDriven.numericColumnsAvailable: {{count}} numeric columns available in graduated mode.
dataDriven.missingColumnHelp: Column "{{column}}" is no longer available. Pick another column or clear the data-driven style.
dataDriven.statsUnavailableHelp: Statistics are not available for this column yet. Pick another numeric column or try again after the dataset finishes processing.
dataDriven.jenksSampledHint: Natural breaks are computed from a representative sample of the column, not every value.
dataDriven.manualBreaksInvalid: Enter at least one break value in strictly ascending order.
dataDriven.categoriesWarning: {{count}} categories -- consider using graduated mode for many values.

search.title: Add Dataset
search.dialogDescription: Search and add datasets as layers to your map.
search.catalogEmpty: Your catalog is empty. Upload a dataset to get started.
search.zeroResultBody: Try a different search term, or browse all datasets.
search.error: Failed to load datasets. Check your connection and try again.

share.title: Share
share.dialogDescription: Control who can access this map and how it's shared.
share.privateDescription: Only you and admins can view this map
share.internalDescription: Anyone signed in to GeoLens can view this map
share.publicDescription: Visible to anyone — enables share links and embedding
share.publicHint: Anyone with the link can view this map
share.privateHint: Only you can see this map
share.cannotPublish: Cannot publish: datasets {{datasets}} are not public
share.embedTokenInfo: Non-public layers are included. An embed token handles access automatically.
share.unsavedWarning: Unsaved changes are only in the builder preview. Save before copying links or embeds.
share.audienceHiddenWarning: Hidden from viewers: {{layers}}. These layers' datasets are private or unpublished, so they will not appear for anyone but you.
share.savingWarning: Saving changes. Share links and embeds update after this save finishes.
share.saveFailedWarning: Save failed. Share links and embeds still show the last saved map until you retry successfully.
share.expirationHint: Leave blank for a link that never expires
share.domainHint: Comma-separated origins. Leave empty for unrestricted access.
share.originsEmptyHint: No origins yet — paste a URL like https://example.com to allow embedding.
share.originsNormHint: Each origin is normalized to scheme + host + port before saving.
share.iframeErrorBody: Check that the embed token is valid and the share link is active. Reload to retry.
share.iframeSandboxNote: The embed preview runs in a restricted sandbox that permits scripts only.
share.embedTokenMissing: This map contains non-public layers. Viewers may not be able to see all layers without an embed token.
share.embedTokenNotAvailable: The embed token was created in a previous session. Regenerate to get the embed code.
share.expirationCleared: Link expiration removed. The link never expires.
share.makePublicHint: Make this map public to generate a share link
share.rawTokenUnavailable: For security, the full share link is only shown when it is created. Regenerate the link to copy it again.
share.embedTokenForDomains: Create an embed token to restrict this embed to specific domains.

chat.emptyState: Describe changes to your map using natural language.
chat.streamInterrupted: Response interrupted — some changes were applied.
chat.errorFriendly: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.errorSessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
chat.errorForbidden: You don't have permission to use AI chat.
chat.takingLonger: This is taking longer than usual...
chat.mentionHint: Type @ to mention a layer, / for commands

commands.style: Change layer colors, opacity, or visual style
commands.label: Add or configure feature labels
commands.add: Add a dataset as a new layer

suggestions.searchDatasets: Find datasets to add to this map
suggestions.styleAllLayers: Apply a color theme across all layers
suggestions.addDataset: Add another dataset to this map
suggestions.nearbyFeatures: Show nearby features in this area

queryResult.empty: The AI query returned no rows.
queryResult.emptyHint: Try a broader area or different filter.

chat.bannerForbiddenBody: You no longer have permission to use AI chat. Contact your administrator to restore access.
chat.bannerUnavailableBody: The AI service is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
chat.errorRateLimited: Daily AI usage limit reached. Try again tomorrow or ask an admin to raise the budget.

terrain.title: Terrain
terrain.noDem: Add a DEM raster layer to enable terrain.
terrain.unitsUnknown: Vertical units are unavailable; terrain scale is approximate.
terrain.unitsNonMeter: Vertical units are {{unit}}, not meters; terrain scale is approximate.
terrain.surfaceDescription: Terrain drapes the map surface; Relief layers provide visible shading.
terrain.smallDemWarning: This DEM only covers a small part of the current view. Zoom in to the DEM extent, or drape it over a coarse global DEM (e.g. Copernicus GLO-30) so terrain stays smooth across the whole map.

info.title: Map Info
info.dialogDescription: Details and metadata for this map.
info.author: Author

toasts.mapSavedFullResync: Map saved, but required a full re-sync. Please double-check layer styling.
toasts.mapNowInternal: Map is now visible to team members
toasts.mapForkedExcluded: Map forked! {{count}} layer(s) excluded -- you don't have access to those datasets
toasts.popupConfigInvalidNamed: Cannot save: layer "{{layerName}}" has an invalid popup expression.
toasts.popupConfigBackendRejected: Server rejected the popup configuration ({{field}}). Adjust the layer's popup template and save again.
toasts.terrainDisabledSourceRemoved: 3D terrain disabled — its source layer was removed.
toasts.bulkGroupNeedTwo: Select at least 2 loose layers to group
toasts.bulkGroupSkipped: Some selected layers are already grouped and can't be grouped again
toasts.bulkGroupSkippedType: Non-vector layers can't be grouped — remove them from your selection and try again
toasts.bulkGroupSkippedGroupRow: Groups can't be grouped — remove any group rows from your selection and try again

builderMap.authError: Session expired. Reload the page to restore tile access.
builderMap.mapError: Map tile error. Some layers may not render correctly.
builderMap.mapErrorNamed: Failed to load {{name}}. The layer may not render correctly.
builderMap.basemapIssueDescription: Your data layers are still editable. Check the basemap service or choose another basemap if the background stays blank.
builderMap.clusterTruncated: cluster source exceeded the bounded GeoJSON limit
builderMap.clusterLoadError: {{name}} is rendering as points because cluster data could not load.
builderMap.tokenError: Failed to load tile tokens — some layers may not display.

mapCreate.title: Create Map
mapCreate.descriptionAI: Create a new map manually or generate one with AI.
mapCreate.aiPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Create a map of major roads and country boundaries
mapCreate.aiHelpText: Tip: Start simple, then refine your map using the chat assistant after creation.

mapDelete.title: Delete map
mapDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete <1>{{mapName}}</1>? This action cannot be undone.

attributeForm.descriptionEdit: Update attribute values for this feature.
attributeForm.descriptionNew: Fill in attribute values for the new feature, or skip to save with defaults.

history.title: History
history.emptyDescription: History starts after saved edits are recorded for this map.
history.errorDescription: Try closing and reopening this panel.
history.notAvailableTitle: Save this map to see history
history.notAvailableDescription: Edit history is available after the map exists.

leaveWarning.title: Unsaved changes
leaveWarning.description: You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you leave this page.

a11y.dragPickup: Picked up {{name}}. Use arrow keys to choose a position, Enter to drop, Escape to cancel.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Speed up map authoring with these shortcuts.
shortcuts.escape: Close panel / clear selection / exit reorder

styleJson.title: Style JSON
styleJson.description: Export or import a portable MapLibre style document.
styleJson.exportHint: Download `{{filename}}` with sources, layers, filters, labels, sprites, glyphs, and viewport metadata.
styleJson.importHint: Importing creates a new map — your current map won't be changed.

errors.notObject: Style JSON must be an object.

bulkActions.groupDisabledTooltip: Select only loose layers to group
bulkActions.deleteConfirmLabel: Delete {{count}} layers? This cannot be undone.
bulkActions.errorUpdateRolledBack: Failed to update layers — changes rolled back.
bulkActions.errorDeleteRolledBack: Failed to delete {{count}} layers — no changes made.
bulkActions.deletePartialFailure: {{deleted}} of {{count}} layers deleted. {{failed}} failed. — Tap to retry.
bulkActions.deleteRollback: Delete failed — no changes were made.

unifiedStack.title: Layers
unifiedStack.emptyBody: Search the catalog or pick a starter dataset below.
unifiedStack.emptyHelpBody: Search the catalog to find datasets, or use the Upload button to add your own.
unifiedStack.emptySearchButton: Search and open Add Data modal
unifiedStack.browseAllLabel: Browse all datasets in the Add Data modal
unifiedStack.openSuggestion: Open {{name}} in the Add Data dialog

rail.aiUnavailableDescription: An administrator needs to enable an AI provider before Ask AI can be used in this builder.
rail.aiDisabledBody: An administrator has disabled AI for this instance.
rail.aiNoKeyBody: A provider API key is required before AI chat can be used.
rail.aiPermissionBody: You don't have permission to use AI chat.

stackRow.drawsNothing: Not shown — enable Hillshade or 3D terrain

basemapGroup.sublayersSectionHint: Click any sublayer in the sidebar to style it individually.
basemapGroup.visibilityLocked: Basemap is always visible — use Remove basemap to hide.

basemapSublayer.resetConfirmMessage: This will remove all custom appearance for {{sublayer}}.

demEditor.terrainHint: Terrain uses elevation data to extrude the map surface.
demEditor.hypsometricRangeNote: Elevation tint spans 0–4000 m and assumes meters. DEMs in other units or ranges may appear flat.
demEditor.overlayOffHint: Relief shading is off — this DEM draws no 2D overlay.

folderGroup.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete this group and all its layers?

layerEditor.deleteLayerConfirmMessage: Delete this layer? This cannot be undone.

confirmDelete.message: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

confirmRenderAs.message: Compatible style is carried over; only mode-specific settings will reset. Continue?

source.noColumns: No queryable columns indexed for this layer.

emptyResult.title: 0 features in view — check your filter
emptyResult.help: The current filter matches nothing in the visible map area. Matches may exist off-screen — pan or zoom out, adjust a condition, or clear the filter.

errors.mapMessage: Map error — refresh the page to restore tile access.

settings.pluginsAvailabilityNote: Controls whether each plugin appears on the map.
settings.globeDisclaimer: Globe projection is experimental. Some layers may not render correctly.
settings.terrainSmallDemTip: Tip: for a small high-resolution DEM, drape it over a coarse global DEM (e.g. Copernicus GLO-30) so terrain stays smooth beyond its extent.

mobileNotice: The map builder works best on a larger screen. Some controls are limited here.
